title: FareComponent
description: A component of an air travel fare that applies to a specific flight segment or leg, used in aviation pricing.

fareBasisCode.description: IATA fare basis code identifying the fare type

bookingCode.description: Booking class code (e.g. Y, M, K)

segmentRef.description: Flight segment this fare component applies to

title.description: Title or label of this price component

tags.description: Tags associated with this price component
